name: raptor-runner
description: A pixel-art homage to the Chrome 'No Internet' dinosaur game, with a full day/night cycle and a starry sky.

scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run electron:compile && wait-on http://localhost:5173 && NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.icons:generate: cd public/assets && magick icon-512.png -resize 1024x1024 icon-tmp.png && magick icon-tmp.png \( -size 1024x1024 xc:none -fill white -draw 'roundrectangle 0,0,1023,1023,229,229' \) -alpha set -compose DstIn -composite PNG32:icon-rounded-1024.png && magick icon-rounded-1024.png -resize 512x512 PNG32:icon-rounded-512.png && rm icon-tmp.png
scripts.electron:compile: tsc electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --outDir electron --module CommonJS --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --target ES2022 --skipLibCheck
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder
scripts.electron:preview: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron .
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run cap:sync && cap run ios
scripts.cap:run:android: bash -c 'source scripts/android-env.sh && npm run build:mobile && cap sync android && cap run android'
scripts.build:android:release:
bash -c 'source scripts/android-env.sh && npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease && echo "
✅ AAB: android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab"'
scripts.build:android:apk:
bash -c 'source scripts/android-env.sh && npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && echo "
✅ APK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk"'
scripts.build:ios:release: bash -c 'echo "⚠️  iOS release builds require: (1) Apple Developer account, (2) Team ID configured in Xcode, (3) a distribution certificate + provisioning profile. See docs/IOS_RELEASE.md for the full flow. Opening Xcode now."; npm run cap:sync && cap open ios'
scripts.android:logcat: bash -c 'source scripts/android-env.sh && adb logcat -s Capacitor Capacitor/Console Capacitor/WebView chromium'
